mano_cua.result_summary: 编辑器画布完全空白，无法测试节点图标、group颜色、图标更新三项功能。根本原因：the-graph-editor.html（Polymer组件文件）返回HTTP 404，导致自定义元素无法注册，编辑器无法初始化渲染。photobooth.json.js数据文件存在且包含groups/ports数据，但编辑器本身无法加载。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Critical Polymer component file the-graph-editor.html returns HTTP 404, preventing the-graph-editor custom element from registering. Graph canvas remains completely black/empty. Only 3 plain HTML buttons visible (autolayout/theme/focus). All 3 test tasks cannot be evaluated. Code in index.html shows setInterval calling editor.updateIcon() for random icon updates but editor is undefined due to loading failure.
